{{CargoRelic
|name=L'Origine du monde
|class_id=20150
|rank=Green
|affct=ART
|source=
|description=This oil painting was the work of the famous Gustave Courbet. In this painting, he denied God as the world's origin and revealed the universe's ultimate mystery: Everyone has to pass the Gate of Genesis test to come to this world before they defeat countless competitors.
|fame=18
|art=30
|fth=14
|civ=14
|tech=14
|ss1=Per 300 AFFCT, Snail ATK +1<br>AFFCT: 66600/66600
|ss2=Per 300 AFFCT, Snail ATK +1<br>AFFCT: 133200/133200
|ss3=Per 300 AFFCT, Snail ATK +1<br>AFFCT: 199800/199800
|ss4=Per 300 AFFCT, Snail ATK +1<br>AFFCT: 199800/199800
|ss7=Per 300 AFFCT, Snail ATK +1<br>AFFCT: 199800/199800<br> (Awakened)
}}
